# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

# Stage 1 - Build
FROM node:latest as builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install --quiet
COPY . .
ARG NODE_ENV=development
ENV NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV}
RUN npm run build

# Stage 2 - Production Environment
FROM node:latest as production
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
CMD [ "node", "./dist" ]
EXPOSE 8080

# Stage 3 - Development Environment
FROM node:latest as development
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
COPY . .
CMD [ "npm", "run", "dev-server" ]
EXPOSE 8081
